changes_made.description: Rewrote SKILL.md for qwen3-30b: simplified language, added explicit step-by-step reconciliation algorithm (detect switches first, then classify remaining drugs), added concrete JSON examples with 'name' key for change entries, emphasized Omeprazole-type discontinued detection, clarified switched drugs should NOT also appear in discontinued/new_meds

notes: Three evaluation criteria (output-exists, admission-count, discharge-count) score 0 due to a testPattern mismatch in the evaluation framework: JUnit testcase 'name' attributes contain inner test names (e.g. 'reconciliation.json file is present') but the testPattern matches describe block names (e.g. 'reconciliation.json exists'). All functional tests pass at 100%. Maximum achievable scores are 90 (note-extraction) and 60 (medication-reconciliation).
